１０スタージェム
※報酬アイテムは既に入手

We finally found a way home, thanks to the
clues we gathered from our previous explorations.
The path seems to be a place where a mysterious
energy gathers. A place called Nightfall Province.
However, I heard there's a lot of dangerous
enemies there. Kinda dangerous for just the two
of us. So sorry to bother you again, but we could
really use your help.
With Ethan and Karen as your only
partners, clear on Normal or above.

10 Star Gems
Otorgado al informar. Límite de una vez por cuenta.

10 Star Gems
